summary: Frontend-only regression + refinement verification for Artham landing page. All 10 refinement checkpoints from the review request PASS on desktop (1440x900) and mobile (375x812). Zero page/console errors.

verified_checkpoints.title: Artham — Meaningful Care. Beautifully Delivered.
verified_checkpoints.hero_minimalist: hero-section renders single-column with hero-logo (top), overline 'Orthopedic · Aesthetic · Wellness', hero-headline two-line 'Meaningful Care. / Beautifully Delivered.', one subhead paragraph, single CTA hero-discover-btn. No seed sprite / side illustration present.
verified_checkpoints.hero_logo_blend: hero-logo img src points to Artham logo asset. Parent wrapper has isolation:isolate + bg #efdfc8 (arabian). img has mix-blend-mode:darken. Visually the copper lotus + अर्थम् sit directly on the beige with no white/black tile (screenshot confirmed).
verified_checkpoints.discover_smooth_scroll: Click hero-discover-btn scrolls window from y=0 to y=900 towards #journey.
verified_checkpoints.doctor_cards_full_body: doctor-card-dr-omaima-jawed and doctor-card-dr-manu-gautam both use bg-black container with img className containing 'object-contain object-bottom'.
verified_checkpoints.brand_aesthetique_image: chapter-aesthetique image container has bg-black and img uses object-contain (object-bottom). CTA present.
verified_checkpoints.brand_orthocare_image: chapter-orthocare image container has bg-black and img uses object-contain (object-bottom). CTA present.
verified_checkpoints.patient_journey_cards: patient-journey-aesth-card and patient-journey-ortho-card outer motion.button carries bg-black; imgs use object-contain object-bottom; bottom-only warm gradient overlay (h-1/2 from-black) confirmed in code.
verified_checkpoints.prev_checkpoints: philosophy-section, the-split-section, chapter-aesthetique-cta, chapter-orthocare-cta, shared-philosophy-bridge, journey-timeline-section, statistics-section, patient-journey-section all present. No top nav present.
verified_checkpoints.responsive: No horizontal overflow — desktop sw=iw=1440, mobile sw=iw=375.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified the minimalist hero refresh + object-contain image containers + logo blend-mode fixes. Note test-id naming: the split section uses 'the-split-section' (not 'the-split'), timeline uses 'journey-timeline-section', patient journey uses 'patient-journey-section'. No floating-whatsapp data-testid was found — if this must be verified in future iterations, main agent may need to add the attribute; visually a floating WA affordance was present in iteration_2.
